#filter substitution # # This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public # License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this # file, You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. #ifdef MOZ_PLACES #endif # All sets except for popupsets (commands, keys, and stringbundles) # *must* go into the browser-sets.inc.xhtml file so that they can be shared with # other top level windows in macWindow.inc.xhtml. #include browser-sets.inc.xhtml #include main-popupset.inc.xhtml #include appmenu-viewcache.inc.xhtml # These strings are used to compose the window title. They are in the DOM to # benefit from startup caching. #include navigator-toolbox.inc.xhtml #include browser-box.inc.xhtml #include fullscreen-and-pointerlock.inc.xhtml
